reference: My forehead is numb. Five days ago, it was on the right side of my face, originating from my forehead. Now, it is on the right side, just as numb. I have done nothing. I haven't experienced any trauma. I do not think I have Lyme disease. Does it sound like Multiple Sclerosis or Trigeminal Neuralgia? I experienced numbness in my head, especially now; it is pretty bad. I cannot afford a Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan. What is your best advice?
text: my forehead is numb five days ago it was on the right side of my face originating from my forehead now it is on the right side is numb i have done nothing i haven't experienced any trauma i do not think i have lyme disease does it sound like multiple sclerosis or trigeminal neuralgia i experience numbness in my head especially now it is pretty bad i cannot afford a magnetic resonance imaging scan what is your best advice
